profile.summary: Product designer focused on B2B UX, Figma systems, and usability tests.

jobDescription: CanvasPay is hiring a Product Designer to evolve our Figma design system, run usability tests, and ship B2B payment UX with engineers. Strong prototyping and research synthesis required.
cvText:
Avery Kim
Product Designer

Experience:
- Product Designer at PayNest (2020-2025)
- Maintained a Figma component library used by three squads
- Ran usability tests on checkout and payouts flows
- Partnered with engineers on accessible B2B payment UX

Skills: Figma, design systems, user research, prototyping, accessibility
Education: BA Graphic Design, Art & Tech College
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the Product Designer role at CanvasPay. At PayNest I maintained a Figma design system, ran usability tests on checkout and payouts, and partnered with engineers on accessible B2B payment UX.

I would like to bring that systems-minded design craft to CanvasPay.

Sincerely,
Avery Kim
